nasb.text: Then Moses called to them, and Aaron and all the rulers in the congregation returned to him; and Moses spoke to them.

esv.text: But Moses called to them, and Aaron and all the leaders of the congregation returned to him, and Moses talked with them.

cnv.text: 摩西叫他們過來，於是，亞倫和會眾中所有的首領才回到摩西那裡去，摩西就與他們談話。

ccb.text: 摩西召他们过来，亚伦和会众的首领便上前来。摩西与他们说话。
